pay.title: Make a Payment
pay.qrSubtitle: Scan the QR code on the POS device.

pay.qrPlaceholder: QR scanner arrives with the native setup
pay.qrPermissionDenied: Camera permission was not granted. You can type the code value below.

pay.failGeneric: The transaction could not be completed. Please try again.

transfer.title: Balance Transfer
transfer.betweenMyCardsSub: Move balance between your own cards
transfer.otherCardSubtitle: Enter the recipient's Metropol Card number and the phone number registered to the card. A verification code will be sent to that phone via SMS.
transfer.otherCardOtpSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to the recipient's phone. The code was sent to the phone registered to the card; ask the recipient for it.
transfer.toPhoneSub: Send balance to a phone number
transfer.savedRecipientSub: Send quickly to your saved recipients
transfer.qrManualHint: If the camera is unavailable, you can type the value from the recipient's QR code.
transfer.needSecondCard: You need at least two cards to transfer between your own cards.
transfer.noSavedRecipients: You have no saved recipients yet. You can save one with "Save as a recipient" while confirming a transfer.
transfer.deleteRecipientMessage: "{{label}}" will be removed from your saved recipients.
